title: carex luridiformis
intro: Carex luridiformis, also known as yellow-stemmed sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin infections. Carex luridiformis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to leverage its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.
